calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Julian Sarkar In Support Of Application For Default Judgment Against Defendant Cld Trucking Co. Dba Atlas Moving Systems Ams
Off Calendar Nov-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant CLD Trucking Co., dba Atlas Moving Systems AMS.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40 a.m.

Julian Sarkar, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Jonathan Kim, who was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Sarkar and Kim appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant CLD Trucking Co., dba Atlas Moving Systems AMS.

Plaintiff's Complaint for the Carmack Amendment and Unfair Business Competition was filed on November 12, 2020, and personally served on defendant CLD Trucking Co.'s, dba Atlas Moving Systems AMS, Authorized Agent of Process on November 12, 2020.
Plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents were personally served on defendant Claims System International, Inc.'s Authorized Agent of Process on February 8, 2021.
Default as to defendant CLD Trucking Co., dba Atlas Moving Systems AMS was entered on December 18, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 10, 2021.
Dismissal With Prejudice as to defendant Claims Service International, Inc. was filed with the Clerk's Office on March 10, 2021.

Plaintiff Jonathan Kim submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Writting Binding Moving Agreement..........................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Cashier's Check to moving company..........................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jonathan Kim, and against the defaulted defendant CLD Trucking Co., dba Atlas Moving Systems AMS, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $13,373.16.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,675.00.
Costs - $619.85.

Total - $15,668.01.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepared the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:00 p.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
